title: LANON 8-mil Orange Disposable Nitrile Gloves, Mechanic, Heavy-Duty, Food-Safe, Latex-Free, Powder-Free, Fully Diamond Textured, Medium(Pack of 100)
features: Excellent Chemical Resistance - The disposable chemical gloves are made of 100% nitrile. It's resistant to a variety of solutions, including low-concentration oil grease, brake cleaner, and light and high purity solvents. The three EN ISO 374 test chemicals: K-Level 6, over 480 mins; P-Level 3, over 60 mins; and T-Level 6, over 480 mins.

8-mil Thickness - The heavy-duty orange nitrile gloves are 8-mil extra thick with superior strength, puncture resistant, and won't rip or tear easily. We offer sizes medium, large and xl. The pullout design of the packaging box is convenient and easy to remove.

Ultra Grip - As disposable work gloves, the fully diamond textured design provides a good grip with a low risk of slipping. It offers workers a strong, efficient grip while handling tools and equipment, especially when working in wet or greasy applications.

Food Safe & Multipurpose - The orange disposable gloves are food grade, latex-free, DEHP-free, and meet F.D.A 21 C.F.R, composed of better solutions for people with sensitive skin. They are ideal for hair dye, food handling, cooking, food prep, BBQ, grill, cleaning, kitchen, and more.

Next-level Performance - LANON disposable gloves for hand protection are tested to meet the F.D.A 21 C.F.R, suitable for contact with all food types, EU Certificated, CAT III, with Standards EN ISO 374-1:2016+A1:2018 / Type B, EN 374-4:2013, EN ISO 374-5:2016, and have an AQL of 4.0.
